calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Trustees And Attorneys Fees And Costs Advanced
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Trisha Friedeberg for Trustee.

The Court noted the funds were all for fees and not much left for beneficiary. Ms. Friedeberg stated that the beneficiary is fine with getting a very small amount and the Trustee explained to siblings what to expect. The Court notes there were no objections.

The Petition for Approval of Trustee's and Attorney's Fees and Costs Advanced is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Feder for Trustee.

Mr. Feder requested a 30-day continuance stating that he received all of the bank statements last week. Status on the accounting was continued to November 20, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2354 42nd Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for and with Brenda Johe (Trustee).

One hundred percent of the property sold for $725,000.00. The Court confirmed sale of 50% interest of the Estate based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $260,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Andrade.
